settings.privacy_text:
Islamvy prioritizes your privacy above all else.

1. Data Security: Your data is stored on encrypted and secure servers.
2. Confidentiality: Your personal information (name, birth date, dream content) is strictly confidential and never shared with third parties or ad networks.
3. Purpose: Your data is processed by AI solely to generate personalized content, dream interpretations, and spiritual advice for you.

You can use the app with complete peace of mind.
settings.delete_account_success: Your account has been deleted successfully.
settings.profile_photo_msg: How would you like to update your profile photo?

support.title: Support & FAQ
support.contact_desc: You can always reach out to us for your questions or feedback.

faqs.q: What are the features of Islamvy Premium?
faqs.a: With Islamvy Premium, you enjoy a completely ad-free experience. You also gain exclusive access to background Quran playback, unlimited AI-powered dream interpretations, personalized daily dhikr programs, and priority support in the community area.

faqs.q: How does AI dream interpretation work?
faqs.a: Islamvy combines advanced AI models with traditional Islamic dream interpretation sources to analyze your dreams. While helping you explore the spiritual depths of your dreams, it always reminds us that the ultimate truth belongs only to Allah.

faqs.q: How does the AI dhikr prescription work?
faqs.a: Islamvy analyzes your name, birth date, and intention to create a personalized dhikr program just for you. By combining the treasury of Esma-ul Husna with your temperament analysis, it determines the most suitable divine names and dhikrs for your current state. Each prescription is completely unique to you.

Your personal data and dream records are protected with high-level encryption. Islamvy never shares user data with third parties or advertising networks. Privacy is our core value and commitment to you.

faqs.q: Why is my name visible in the community?
faqs.a: The Islamvy community is built on sincerity and trust. To ensure transparent and reliable interactions, we encourage users to use their real names. This helps foster stronger spiritual connections among members.
